spec.description: This panel tracks IPs that have been banned multiple times across different jails or hosts - potentially indicating more sophisticated attackers.
spec.title: Repeat Offenders (Last 7 days)

spec.description: Tracks the time of day when ban events occur to identify attack patterns
spec.title: Ban Events by Hour of Day (Last 7 days)

spec.description: Displays currently active bans across all hosts and jails
spec.title: Currently Active Bans

spec.description: Shows the number of banned IPs for each host-jail combination
spec.title: Detailed Ban Activity by Host and Jail (24h)

spec.expr: sum by(host, jail) (count_over_time({job="fail2ban", action_type="Ban", severity="NOTICE", hostname=~"$hostname", jail=~"$jail"} [$timeRange]))

spec.title: Ban Activity by Host and Jail ($timeRange)

spec.expr: sum by(host, jail) (count_over_time({job="fail2ban", action_type="Ban", severity="NOTICE", hostname=~"$hostname", jail=~"$jail"}  [24h]))
sum by(host, jail) (count_over_time({job="fail2ban", action_type="Ban", hostname=~"$hostname", jail=~"$jail"} [1h]))
sum by (banned_ip) (count_over_time({job="fail2ban", action_type="Ban", severity="NOTICE", hostname=~"$hostname"} | regexp `Ban (?P<banned_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)` [24h])) > 2

spec.title: Top Ban Sources by Host and Jail (24h)
